summary: Completed all 3 prerequisites and 24 steps for dirty/demand cone + sequential scheduler. Implemented: ReverseDependencyIndex (deps.rs), DemandRegistry with rebuild_cone (demand.rs), compute_dirty_cone/topological_sort/compute_eval_set (dirty.rs), NodeEvaluator trait + SequentialScheduler (reify-runtime). Integration test moved to reify-runtime to avoid circular dev-dependency type issues. 100 tests total (92 reify-eval + 8 reify-runtime), all passing.
